description: A fully-supplied deal drafts a complete anonymized CIM outline: executive summary, company overview, market overview, products & services, financial summary (as-supplied figures and historical rows), management (names withheld), and transaction overview — for review before any distribution.

deal.description: A vertical SaaS platform for logistics operators. Rapidly scaling ARR with strong net revenue retention.
deal.marketNotes: Large, fragmented logistics software TAM growing double digits.
deal.transactionAsk: Majority recapitalization to fund M&A and international expansion.
